description_long: This object is a medium-sized residential house partially obscured by dense, leafy trees. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with several dormer windows and a prominent central section. The exterior walls are light-colored, and the structure appears to have multiple windows arranged in a somewhat symmetrical pattern. The front entryway is visible beneath the tree canopy, with a small set of steps leading up to the main door. The surrounding trees are large, with broad, dark green foliage that provides significant shade and coverage. The overall scene suggests a suburban or park-like setting, with the house nestled among mature landscaping.
description: A light-colored, multi-gabled house nestled beneath large, leafy trees, with a prominent entryway and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: The front of the house is visible, framed by three large trees, with the entryway and main roofline clearly seen.
description_view_1: The left side of the house is partially visible, with one large tree dominating the view and obscuring much of the structure.
description_view_2: The house is almost completely hidden behind the dense foliage of the trees, with only the tree trunks and leaves visible.
description_view_3: The right side of the house is mostly obscured by trees, but a small portion of the structure and roof can be glimpsed through the leaves.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, partially sheltered by tree canopy, simple door, and minimal decorative elements.
